title: AFTER SCHOOL PROGRAM - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY OF BEND AFTER SCHOOL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an after school program that includes guitar lessons, arts and crafts, and enrichment programs. Also offers English language classes. 515 NE Dekalb Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: After school program and guitar lessons: Elementary, middle, or high school age students English classes: Age 18 and older Hours: After school program, Wednesdays 3pm-5pm Guitar lessons, Wednesdays 4:30pm-5:30pm Adult English Classes, Wednesdays 6pm-7pm (541) 389-8888 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 389-8888 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: none LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Deschutes, Crook, and Jefferson Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1:30pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Take Highway 97/3rd Street to Dekalb Avenue. Head towards Bend High School. On the right on 5th and Dekalb Avenue. Services: English as a Second Language Music Instruction Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - SOCIAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY OF BEND
